name: Spaghetti All'amatriciana
recipeIngredient: 125 g Salt pork cheek (or pancetta, speck, or bacon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Note: Salt pork cheek substitute pancetta, speck, or bacon. Grated pecorino cheese substitute parmesan.
2. Pass the tomatoes through a sieve and dice the chili into pieces.
3. Heat oil in a pan and add the bacon. Fry for 1 minute until crisp.
4. Add the diced chili and chopped onion to the pan. Cook until the onions are translucent.
5. Add the white wine and cook for 1 minute.
6. Stir in the canned tomatoes and cook for 10 minutes, allowing flavors to meld.
7. Add the spaghetti to the pan and toss it into the sauce. Cook for 2 minutes, ensuring the pasta is well coated.
8. Remove from heat and sprinkle with grated pecorino cheese (or parmesan). Serve hot.
